properties.description: Confirms SSM Agent is current and installs/configures the CloudWatch Agent for centralized logging and metrics.

properties.name: UpdateSSMAgent
properties.description: Updates SSM Agent to latest from AWS S3

properties.name: InstallCloudWatchAgent
properties.description: Installs CloudWatch Agent from AWS S3; config pushed via SSM Parameter Store at launch time

properties.name: PlaceholderForEDRAgent
properties.description: Placeholder for EDR/AV agent install (e.g., CrowdStrike, Defender for Endpoint); pull installer/token from S3 or Secrets Manager at build time

properties.name: ConfirmAgentsRunning
properties.description: Validates AmazonSSMAgent and AmazonCloudWatchAgent services are present and running
PowerShell execution action used across multiple steps

properties.name: AmazonSSMAgent
properties.description: AWS Systems Manager Agent for instance management

properties.name: AmazonCloudWatchAgent
properties.description: CloudWatch Agent for centralized logging and metrics
Latest SSM Agent installer for Windows x64
Latest CloudWatch Agent MSI for Windows x64
CloudWatch Agent config pushed via SSM Parameter Store + amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl config-from-ssm at instance launch; keeps golden image environment-agnostic
Applies a CIS Benchmark-aligned hardening baseline for Windows Server. Extend with org-specific STIG/CIS control set.

properties.name: ApplyCISBaseline
properties.description: Applies CIS hardening baseline via PowerShell commands
PowerShell execution action
Account/Password policy: min length 14, max age 60 days, lockout threshold 5, duration 15 min, window 15 min
Disable SMBv1 protocol
Disable built-in Guest account
Enable Windows Firewall on all profiles (Domain, Public, Private)
Disable LLMNR (Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution) - common lateral movement vector
Disable WDigest credential caching to prevent credential theft
Enable audit logging for logon/logoff and account management events
Microsoft's official CIS Benchmark GPO baseline via LGPO.exe import for full enterprise compliance
properties.reference: LGPO.exe import / DSC configuration referencing org's compliance-as-code repo

properties.description: Runs a Pester test suite against the built image to confirm hardening, agents, and baseline expectations before the AMI is marked AVAILABLE.

properties.name: InstallPester
properties.description: Installs Pester testing module v5.0.0+

properties.name: WritePesterTests
properties.description: Writes Pester test suite to C:\golden-image-tests.ps1

properties.name: RunPesterTests
properties.description: Runs Pester tests; exits with code 1 if any fail, blocking image promotion
PowerShell execution action

tests: SSM Agent service exists and is running
Windows Firewall enabled on all profiles

properties.name: Pester
properties.description: PowerShell testing framework

properties.test: SSM Agent service exists and is running
Windows Firewall enabled on all profiles

properties.description: Installs all available Windows Updates at build time so the AMI is never built from a stale patch baseline.

properties.name: InstallWindowsUpdates
properties.description: Installs PSWindowsUpdate module and installs all available Windows Updates

properties.name: RebootAfterUpdates
properties.description: Reboots instance after updates with 30 second delay

properties.name: ConfirmNoPendingUpdates
properties.description: Confirms no pending updates remain after install/reboot cycle; exits with error if updates still pending
PowerShell execution action
Image Builder Reboot action with delay

properties.name: PSWindowsUpdate
properties.description: PowerShell module for managing Windows Updates
Scans for available Windows Updates
Installs Windows Updates with -AcceptAll -IgnoreReboot -Confirm:$false
